description_long: This is a heavily armored combat tactical vehicle resembling a modern main battle tank, featuring a large, centrally mounted rotating turret with a long-barreled cannon extending forward. The hull is robust and angular, with thick armor plating covering the entire body, including the sides, front, and rear. The vehicle is equipped with wide, continuous metal tracks for all-terrain mobility, and the suspension system is partially visible beneath the side skirts. The turret houses additional equipment such as a machine gun mount, observation devices, and communication antennas. The exterior is finished in a disruptive camouflage pattern with shades of gray, blue, and black, and there are visible markings on the side. The vehicle's design suggests it is built for urban and battlefield environments, prioritizing protection, firepower, and mobility.
description: A heavily armored main battle tank with a large turret, long cannon, and wide metal tracks, finished in a blue-gray camouflage pattern with visible side markings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the thick frontal armor, central cannon, and wide tracks flanking the hull.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the cannon, side armor skirts, and visible markings on the hull.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine deck, rear armor, and the back ends of the tracks.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the turret, cannon, and additional markings, with the suspension and track details visible.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One large cannon mounted on the turret front, one machine gun mount on the turret roof.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body coverage with thick, sloped armor plating on the front, sides, and rear; turret and hull both appear heavily reinforced.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Disruptive camouflage pattern in gray, blue, black, and white with angular and irregular shapes.
attribute_military_markings: Yellow and blue diagonal stripe with a circular insignia on the side hull; no other visible numbers or symbols.
